description_long: This is a modern, two-story urban house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The front facade features a mix of materials, including dark wood slats, glass railings, and large windows, creating a striking contrast with the light gray exterior walls. The ground floor includes a garage with a black segmented door, a main entrance with a wooden door, and a small porch area. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with minimal window openings and clean, uninterrupted wall surfaces. The upper floor has a balcony with a glass railing and a partially covered area, while the overall structure sits on a raised platform or foundation. The house's design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, wood accents, and a glass balcony, set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, wood slats, glass balcony, and a mix of dark and light materials.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid light gray wall and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, two small windows on the lower level, and a continuous light gray wall.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring several windows, a secondary entrance or exit, and a continuation of the geometric wall pattern.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden door, small porch, and overhang, accented by wood slats and adjacent to a garage door.
